summary: Completed end-to-end backend testing of Generador de Horarios Escolares (FastAPI + MongoDB + Genetic Algorithm). 16/16 pytest tests passed via the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. All requested endpoints work: health, seed, data fetch, profesor/grupo/materia CRUD (with cascade deletes), config update/persistence, CSV upload (with idempotent upsert by name for profesores/grupos), generate (assignment count == sum of horas_semanales, returns assignments/fitness_history/broken_rules/best_fitness/dias/hora_inicio/hora_fin), last-schedule retrieval, clear, and both validation errors (400 when no materias and when hora_fin <= hora_inicio).

minor.issue: DELETE always returns 200 {ok: true} even when the id does not exist. Consider returning 404 for non-existent resources for correctness/diagnostics.

Materias are NOT upserted by (nombre, profesor, grupo) — re-uploading the same CSV duplicates materias. Only profesores/grupos are deduped by name. Spec says 'creates entities idempotently (upserts by name)' so materias should likely also be deduped or replaced.
Returns {} (empty object) with HTTP 200 when no schedule has ever been generated; a 404 would be more conventional, but {} is acceptable.
No dedicated GET endpoint for config — config is only exposed via /api/data. Not a defect, but worth noting.
broken_rules.horas_sin_asignar is hard-coded to 0 in genetic.py — does not detect when n_slots < total sessions (insufficient time slots). Could be enhanced to actually count unassigned hours.

action_items: (Optional) Return 404 from DELETE endpoints when resource not found.
(Optional) Make /api/upload-csv idempotent for materias as well (upsert by (nombre, profesor_id, grupo_id) or update horas_semanales).
(Optional) Track and report 'horas_sin_asignar' in genetic.py when n_slots < total sessions.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py – CORS uses allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=True; browsers reject this combination. Either set explicit origins or set allow_credentials=False.
server.py – DELETE endpoints don't verify existence; silently return ok even for invalid ids.
server.py – /api/upload-csv inserts materias without dedupe, contradicting the 'idempotent upsert' spec.
genetic.py – horas_sin_asignar is hard-coded to 0; insufficient-slots case is not surfaced.
server.py – Uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('shutdown'); prefer lifespan context manager (FastAPI >=0.93).
test_credentials: Not required — no auth in this app.
seed_data_creation: Used existing POST /api/seed for sample data (4 profesores, 3 grupos, 9 materias). Created TEST_-prefixed entities during CRUD tests; collections cleared with DELETE /api/clear at start and end of CSV/generate suites.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all required endpoints. Re-run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml. Tests call MongoDB DELETE /api/clear which wipes profesores/grupos/materias/schedule — do not run in production. Frontend not tested per request.
rca of the issue: No bugs found requiring RCA. Minor observations listed above are enhancement suggestions.
